scripts.clean: npm run clean-grammar; npm run clean-compiled
scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-spans.s8 > /tmp/_s9_spans.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_spans.ts Stage9-spans.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-ast.s8 > /tmp/_s9_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_ast.ts Stage9-ast.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-sugar.s8 > /tmp/_s9_sugar.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_sugar.ts Stage9-sugar.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-lower.s8 > /tmp/_s9_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_lower.ts Stage9-lower.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-codegen.s8 > /tmp/_s9_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_codegen.ts Stage9-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-macro-env.s8 > /tmp/_s9_macro_env.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_macro_env.ts Stage9-macro-env.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-macro-expand.s8 > /tmp/_s9_macro_expand.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_macro_expand.ts Stage9-macro-expand.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-scope-resolve.s8 > /tmp/_s9_scope_resolve.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_scope_resolve.ts Stage9-scope-resolve.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9-reader.s8 > /tmp/_s9_reader.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_reader.ts Stage9-reader.ts && npx tsx ../stage8/index.ts Stage9.s8 > /tmp/_s9_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s9_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest --typecheck run
